__scoring_convention__.summary: Scoring convention for secret_key_names.json. See data_classifier/engines/secret_scanner.py:329-374 for the matching and tiering logic that consumes this file.

score_to_tier.definitive: score >= 0.90 — key name alone is sufficient evidence; only a plausibility check on the value is required
score_to_tier.strong: 0.70 <= score < 0.90 — key name is a moderate signal; needs relative entropy or char-class diversity on the value
score_to_tier.contextual: score < 0.70 — ambiguous standalone; needs both entropy AND diversity on the value

match_types.substring: pattern appears anywhere in the lowered key name
match_types.word_boundary: pattern at start, end, or flanked by _ - . space
match_types.suffix: pattern at end preceded by _ - . space
